summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. It shows a screenshot of a social-media post praising ICE agents assisting TSA, beside a profile photo and a photo of officers in ICE vests at an airport checkpoint. The segment cuts to a split screen of airport-security-line footage marked ST. PAUL, MN, a woman interviewee via video link, and an anchor. The lower-third reads I.C.E. AGENTS AT AIRPORTS HELPING TSA W/LINES.

script.scene: A social-media post about ICE agents assisting TSA is shown beside a photo of officers in ICE vests at an airport.
A split screen shows airport-security-line footage marked ST. PAUL, MN, an interviewee, and an anchor.
Continued footage; lower-third reads I.C.E. AGENTS AT AIRPORTS HELPING TSA W/LINES.

notable_text: I.C.E. AGENTS AT AIRPORTS HELPING TSA W/LINES; ST. PAUL, MN; FOX NEWS ALERT
